deployment.authenticatedPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
deployment.authenticatedPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
deployment.localTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
deployment.title: Deployment and auth

feedbackSharing.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
feedbackSharing.description: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Flyto2 Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedbackSharing.noDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedbackSharing.devHint: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
feedbackSharing.title: AI feedback sharing

keyboardShortcuts.description: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts

backupRetention.description: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
backupRetention.title: Backup retention

censorUsername.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
censorUsername.title: Censor username in logs

signOut.description: Sign out of this Flyto2 instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
signOut.title: Sign out

general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
general.title: General

heartbeats.disableConfirm: Disable timer heartbeats for all {count} enabled {noun}?
heartbeats.noHeartbeats: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats

instance.comingSoon: This feature is under development and will be available in a future release.
instance.title: Instance Settings

editMember.implicitGrantsNoRole: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
editMember.implicitIncludedNote: Included implicitly by the {role} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
editMember.grantsDescription: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
editMember.description: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {memberName}.
editMember.title: Edit member

joinRequests.description: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
joinRequests.title: Pending human joins

access.instanceAdminNotice: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.

humans.description: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
humans.noMembers: No user memberships found for this company yet.
humans.title: Humans

access.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
access.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage company members.
access.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {companyName}.
access.title: Company Access

feedbackSharing.description: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Flyto2 Labs.
feedbackSharing.toggleHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedbackSharing.toggle: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Flyto2 Labs
feedbackSharing.title: Feedback Sharing

appearance.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
appearance.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
appearance.title: Appearance

general.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
general.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
general.title: General

dangerZone.archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
dangerZone.archiveConfirm: Archive company "{name}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
dangerZone.title: Danger Zone

hiring.requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
hiring.requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
hiring.title: Hiring

invites.generateHint: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
invites.hintTooltip: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
invites.title: Invites

packages.description: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
packages.title: Company Packages

accessDenied.instanceAdminDescription: This page is restricted to instance administrators.
accessDenied.companyAdminDescription: This page is restricted to company administrators and owners.
accessDenied.description: You do not have the required permissions to view this page.
accessDenied.title: Access Denied

uninstallDialog.description: Are you sure you want to uninstall this plugin? This action cannot be undone.
uninstallDialog.title: Uninstall Plugin

installDialog.description: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
installDialog.title: Install Plugin

plugins.alphaDescription: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
plugins.noPluginsHint: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
plugins.noExamples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
plugins.title: Plugins

profile.selectCompanyForUpload: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
profile.uploadHintWithCompany: Stored in Flyto2 file storage for {companyName}.
profile.uploadHintNoCompany: Select a company to upload an avatar into Flyto2 storage.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
profile.title: Profile

common.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
